summary:
Mutations in KCNT2 have been linked primarily to epilepsy, but the provided evidence contains no specific data on their association with other phenotypes. Due to the absence of any discussion of KCNT2 or non-epileptiform features in the materials reviewed, concluding definitively that these mutations only cause epilepsy exceeds the scope of supporting facts. 

The final decision remains $\boxed{\text{B}}$ because assuming exclusivity for epilepsy without corroborating evidence constitutes an unwarranted assumption.  

---

(End of
